title: Vet Follow-Up Notes
text:
## Vet Follow-Up Notes

Patient group: Violet, Matilda, Zebby, and Baby Bear.

**Violet:** Tortie cat and head cat; emotionally {emotion} when meals arrive {adverb}.

**Matilda:** Dark red golden retriever; healthy but {adjective} after {verb ending in -ing} near a {animal}.

**Zebby:** Black kitten; recommends {number} minutes of {adjective} play and fewer attacks on Violet's {object}.

**Baby Bear:** Baby bear; prescribe {food}, naps, and a {color} {clothing item}.

**Clinic advice:** {verb} the {place} before everyone starts a {sound} contest.
